unit: PR10 — Delete root bin/ shims + .gitignore entry (dev-loop ergonomic cleanup)

contract.goal: Complete the dev-loop ergonomic cleanup (PLAN.md § Q6b). Delete the 3 root `bin/` shims (`bin/griot`, `bin/guild`, `bin/loom`) — gitignored relics with misleading provenance per RESEARCH § Q6b. The legacy setup-script symlink farm that needed them was deleted in W9 of marketplace-portable-install (over twice ago: once when install.sh was deleted in W9, and now when the dev-shim era ends). Drop the `/bin/` entry + its explanatory comment from `.gitignore` since the gitignored directory no longer exists. Post-PR10, developers run `node plugins/<plugin>/cli/<cli>.ts` for dev-loop testing, or install the plugin and use its bin.
acceptance_criteria: Root `bin/` directory deleted (all 3 shims: griot, guild, loom; the directory itself deleted).

`.gitignore` explanatory comment for the `/bin/` block deleted (6 lines: 'Top-level bin/ was used by the legacy setup-script symlink farm...' through 'plugin `plugins/<name>/bin/` source shims (committed as part of the migration) remain tracked.').

`.gitignore` node_modules comment updated to drop the now-incorrect `cli/` reference ('Covers both root and any nested node_modules in cli/ or elsewhere' → 'Covers both root and any nested node_modules').

`grep -rn 'install\.sh' --include='*.ts' --include='*.md' .` returns no live hits outside `projects/archive/` (per PLAN PR10's verification — install.sh era is over twice over; no live references should survive).
`npm test` passes (no tests should reference root `bin/` shims — per-plugin tests use per-plugin bin shims; plugin-bin-shims.test.ts at plugins/commons/cli/ tests per-plugin bin shims via tmpdirs).
`node scripts/sync-shared.ts --check` passes (root `bin/` wasn't claimed by any active sync direction).
rules_applied: PLAN.md § PR10 — dev-loop ergonomic cleanup (Q6b). Complement to PR9's substrate-level canonical-root dissolution (Q7). Scope intentionally split per PLAN's 'asymmetric rollback profiles' rationale.
PR9 consolidation: cli/no-install-sh-refs.test.ts was already deleted in PR9, so PR10's scope shrinks to just root bin/ + .gitignore. PR9's checkin notes_for_pr captured this.
PR10 closes the install.sh era for the second (and final) time. The install.sh tripwire test was a forward-looking guard against accidental re-introduction; the substrate has now moved past it twice.

.gitignore comment hygiene: the node_modules comment referenced `cli/` as an example of where nested node_modules might live. Post-PR9 root cli/ is gone, so the example is stale. Updating the comment is reasonable in-scope ergonomic cleanup adjacent to the primary .gitignore edit (same file, same conceptual layer).
disqualifiers: Touching any plugin's bin/ shim (plugins/<plugin>/bin/<plugin>). Those are committed source shims that the marketplace install pipeline depends on; only ROOT bin/ goes away.
Touching anything in projects/ beyond this unit's checkin + auto-emitted events (no manifest edits, no archive moves).
Touching PLAN.md, package.json, README.md, or any other prose — PR11's territory.
Modifying `plugins/commons/cli/plugin-bin-shims.test.ts` — per-plugin bin shim parity is what that test defends; root bin/ deletion doesn't affect that invariant.
Adding new tests (PR10 is a pure deletion).
Drift on `node scripts/sync-shared.ts --check` after the change.
inputs: projects/2026-05-21-repo-compartmentalize/RESEARCH.md (§ Q6b — root bin/ shim relics rationale)
bin/ (root directory; 3 shim files for deletion)
.gitignore (lines 1-7: /bin/ entry + comment block for deletion; lines 9-10: node_modules comment for cli/-mention cleanup)

actions: Wrote memory file for substrate gaps #3 and #4 surfaced in PR8-9 (feedback_loom_pr_opened_orphan_and_guild_spec_path.md). Added to MEMORY.md index. Two memory files now span the four substrate gaps surfaced this project.

Stashed orphan pr-opened event from PR9 (substrate gap #3, recurring). Synced main from origin (was 2 commits behind after PR #26 merge). Reset cleanup branch to updated main. Popped stash so the event lands in PR10's first commit as bookkeeping carry.

Audited PR10 surface: root bin/ has 3 shims (griot, guild, loom) — all gitignored per .gitignore:7. .gitignore comment block (lines 1-6) describes the legacy setup-script symlink farm. Also noted: node_modules comment at line 10 references `cli/` as nested-locations example, stale post-PR9.
PR9-consolidation note: cli/no-install-sh-refs.test.ts already deleted in PR9, so PR10 scope shrinks to root bin/ + .gitignore only (the install.sh tripwire test was PLAN PR10's 2nd bullet, now N/A).

Wrote contract-only checkin 10 via loom checkin write. Skipped grill: clean draft, small surface, no ambiguous fields. Auto-mode bias toward making reasonable calls; .gitignore comment cleanup is small in-scope adjacency.
rm -rf bin/ (deletes 3 shims + directory; gitignored so no git status entry for the deletion).

Edited .gitignore: removed the entire `/bin/` block (6-line comment + the `/bin/` line itself); shortened node_modules comment to drop the `cli/` mention. Resulting .gitignore is 4 lines + node_modules + .DS_Store.
Verified npm test → 637/637 across 39 test files (unchanged from PR9 baseline; no test referenced root bin/).
Verified node scripts/sync-shared.ts --check → ok (4 plugins synced).

Verified install.sh sweep: 5 hits in projects/2026-05-21-repo-compartmentalize/{RESEARCH,RESEARCH-NOTES,PLAN}.md — all narrative-history references describing the migration story (same shape as projects/archive/ content; not live code calls). Will move to projects/archive/ when this project archives. Passes PLAN PR10's verification in spirit (no live calls) even though literal grep returns these hits while the project is still active.

Panel: evaluator-contract-fit only (diff is .gitignore + substrate bookkeeping; no .ts/.tsx files so react-api/test-unit/naming N/A per derive-panel auto-derivation). Returned VERDICT: approved with zero findings.
Scope-shift detection: 0 signals (panel clean; no user comment; no whiteboard; not at phase boundary — PR11 still to go before phase close).

Same orphan-event carry pattern as PR9 carried PR8's: PR10's first commit folds PR9's pr-opened event from events.jsonl (substrate gap #3, captured in [[loom-pr-opened-orphan-event-and-guild-spec-path-gaps]]).
notes_for_pr: Penultimate Phase 3 PR. PR11 (prose sweep: package.json keywords, README, draft-* dead references) closes the phase and the project.
PR10 is SMALLER than PLAN suggested because PR9 consolidated the cli/no-install-sh-refs.test.ts deletion (PR10's 2nd bullet in PLAN). Today's PR is just root bin/ shim deletion + .gitignore cleanup.

Substrate gap #3 reoccurred this unit (PR9's pr-opened event was uncommitted on cleanup branch). Same Pattern A carry as PR9 used for PR8's. Captured in [[loom-pr-opened-orphan-event-and-guild-spec-path-gaps]] memory for future ev-loop sessions.

.gitignore comment hygiene: dropped the `cli/` mention from the node_modules comment since root cli/ went away in PR9. Small adjacency to the primary edit (same file, same conceptual layer — gitignore comments describing what gets excluded).
